change_summary: Prepared a minimal smoke target for live Validator-B Gemini CLI validation.
Adjusted Validator-B prompt transport for Gemini CLI 0.40.0 live behavior.
Changed Windows Gemini .cmd execution to PowerShell argv-array invocation to preserve prompt argument boundaries.
Changed Gemini read-only execution to --approval-mode plan after local --sandbox timed out.
self_review: No product runtime changes are included.
The smoke target contains no secrets or PII.

log.result: Created minimal context for live Validator-B run.
Validator-B live attempt 5 returned PASS through Gemini CLI 0.40.0.
